web.description: Discover Edge House, a 57-story architectural icon in Edgewater Miami offering fully furnished luxury residences for sale with curated interiors, ...
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://edgehousemiami.com/#content)

# YOURS        TO    OWN,        YOURS        TO    SHARE

## WELCOME    TO        EDGE    HOUSE

Experience Modern Luxury Living in Miami’s Vibrant Edgewater Neighborhood.

Edge House is a 57-story residential tower that redefines Miami living. Designed by acclaimed architect Kobi Karp and featuring refined interiors by Adriana Hoyos Design Studio, every residence is thoughtfully curated for style, comfort, and sophistication.

Fully furnished and turnkey, these luxury homes offer a seamless lifestyle in one of the city’s most sought-after neighborhoods.

Schedule a private showing today and explore what makes Edge House the future of luxury living.

## PREMIER        PLACEMENT

**Prime Location Near Biscayne Bay**

Edge House places you at the epicenter of Miami’s cultural and lifestyle scenes. Located in Edgewater, just steps from Biscayne Bay, you’re minutes from Wynwood, the Design District, and Downtown Miami.

Enjoy effortless access to museums, upscale shopping, parks, fine dining, and iconic nightlife — all while living in a peaceful, waterfront enclave. Discover the unbeatable location and see why Edgewater is Miami’s most coveted neighborhood.

[View Neighborhood Highlights](https://edgehousemiami.com/neighborhood/)

![](https://edgehousemiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/Cheers.png)

## EMPOWERING    OWNERS:        OPPORTUNITY    AWAITS

**Flexible Ownership with Short-Term Rental Options**

Edge House empowers buyers with flexibility. Whether you’re looking for a luxury residence, a second home, or an investment property, Edge House offers the rare ability to engage in short-term rentals. In a city known for its thriving tourism market, this opens the door to strong rental income and personal enjoyment — all in a fully managed environment.

Learn more about our short-term rental program and how to own a home that pays you back.

[Explore Amenities](https://edgehousemiami.com/amenities/)

Sauna

Co-working Space

Pool

Pool Deck

Lobby

Residents' Lounge

Fitness Center

Yoga Studio

Sauna

Co-working Space

Pool

Pool Deck

## SOULFUL    &        SOPHISTICATED

**Architectural Elegance Meets Modern Design.**

The architecture of Edge House is inspired by Miami’s energy and elegance. Kobi Karp’s sleek, modern lines are complemented by warm, textured interiors from Adriana Hoyos.

From the ground-level amenities to the panoramic views from the top floors, the design language is one of harmony, fluidity, and timeless appeal.

View our design vision and explore what sets Edge House apart in Miami’s skyline.

[Meet the Team](https://edgehousemiami.com/team/)

![](https://edgehousemiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/Home_Hover.jpg)

![Rendering of Edge House Miami’s newly approved 55-story turnkey residential tower in Edgewater, featuring modern architecture, lush landscaping, and waterfront urban surroundings.](https://edgehousemiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/Night2.jpg)

## BESPOKE        LIVING

**Fully Furnished Residences with Premium Finishes.**

Each home at Edge House is a move-in-ready masterpiece. Residences feature sophisticated Adriana Hoyos furniture collections, European kitchens with quartz countertops, high-end appliances, and spa-inspired bathrooms.

Enjoy balconies with sweeping views of the bay and city. Whether you’re living here year-round or seasonally, every detail is designed for effortless luxury.

Take a closer look at our floorplans and finishes — and find the residence that fits your lifestyle.

[Choose Your Residence](https://edgehousemiami.com/residences/)

![](https://edgehousemiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/LivingRoom_Cropped.jpg)

## REQUEST    MORE        INFORMATION

Complete the form below and a member of our team will personally contact you to share availability, pricing, and ownership options.

Don’t miss your opportunity to own in one of Miami’s only short-term rental approved luxury towers.

Request your personalized info package now.

web.description: Edge House Residences is an incredible 55-story condo in the Edgewater area, with 592 spacious residences. It features a modern architectural design.

### Enjoy Studios to 2 Bedroom Condo Apartments with no rental restrictions

## EDGE HOUSE RESIDENCES

Edge House Residences is an incredible 55-story condo in the Edgewater area, with 592 spacious residences.It features a modern architectural design conceived by Kobi Karp, with a gently concave superstructure accented by prominent horizontal lines and a visually striking base with vertical gold metallic elements.Developed by Grupo T&C.

**[Residences](https://edgehouse.miami/#residences)**

**[Floor plans](https://edgehouse.miami/#floorplans)**

![](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)

![](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)

### UNIQUE STUDIOS, 1 AND 2 BEDROOM RESIDENCES IN THE AMAZING AREA OF EDGEWATER

### RESIDENCE FEATURES

· Studio, 1-bedroom, 1-bedroom + den, 2-bedroom, and select 2-bedrooms with lockout option residences

· Fully finished and furnished, curated by acclaimed interior designer Adriana Hoyos

· 9-foot-high ceilings

· Floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors equipped with sound attenuating, impact-resistant laminated glass

· Private outdoor terraces in select residences

· Owner’s closet in every residence

· High efficiency washer and dryer

· Advanced technology Smart Building wiring for HD TV, telephone, data lines, and ultra-high-speed Internet access

· European kitchen cabinetry

· Top-of-the-line appliances, including paneled refrigerator and dishwasher, built-in microwave oven

· Contemporary stainless steel under-mount sinks

· European bathroom cabinets with premium hardware

· Frameless glass shower enclosures

· Premium, European-style fixtures, and accessories

- [![Kitchen](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/gallery02/eeab0012.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/gallery02/eeab0012_original.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)
- [![Master bedroom](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/gallery02/6c2d1b7a.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/gallery02/6c2d1b7a_original.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)
- [![Bathroom](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/gallery02/d9e08c33.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/gallery02/d9e08c33_original.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)

### SPECTACULAR COMMON AREAS

## LUXURY AMENITIES

· Welcome reception and concierge with an array of personalized services

· Cutting-edge rental reservation system

· 24/7 valet parking

· Lobby lounge with coffee bar and snack service

· Flexible co-working spaces and private meeting rooms

· Ultra-high-speed wifi

· Two resort-style pools overlooking the Miami skyline

· Poolside terraces with lounge chairs, day beds and outdoor rain showers

· Wraparound zen garden and reflecting pond

· Indoor and outdoor lounge areas

· Private spa treatment rooms

· Fully equipped fitness center and private yoga studio

· Game room

· Children’s playground

· Exclusive park for residents

· Sky lounge and residents’ lounge

· Bicycle storage

· Temperature-controlled storage rooms

· EV car charging stations

· LEED certified building

### THE LOCATION

## This new waterfront neighborhood has experienced significant development in recent years, with the construction of high-rise residential buildings, luxury condos, and upscale amenities, featuring a variety of dining options, shopping centers, and entertainment venues.

## Building Address:  [1825 NE 4th Ave, Miami, FL 33132, USA](https://maps.app.goo.gl/7dgKV2bSedoR38mq7)

## \- Brickell: 8 minutes’ drive\- Downtown Miami: 8 minutes’ walk\- Wynwood: 7 minutes’ drive\- Miami Beaches: 15 minutes’ drive\- Aventura: 25 minutes' drive\- Miami Airport: 15 minutes’ drive

![](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/image14.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)

![](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/image02.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)

### Edgewater

### THE AREA

## Investing in Edgewater, Miami, presents numerous advantages. This rapidly developing neighborhood enjoys a prime waterfront location with breathtaking bay views, making it highly desirable for both residential and commercial properties. Edgewater is undergoing significant growth, with luxury high-rises, trendy shops, and upscale dining options attracting a diverse and affluent population. Its proximity to Downtown Miami, Wynwood, and the Design District further enhances its appeal. The area's robust real estate market, driven by Miami's economic growth, promises strong appreciation potential and high rental demand. With a vibrant lifestyle, excellent amenities, and continuous development, Edgewater provides immediate returns and long-term growth, making it an excellent investment opportunity.

## THE TEAM

**DEVELOPER: GRUPO T&C**

Grupo T&C is a real estate and construction company with 100% Peruvian capital, which has 20 years of experience developing hotel, housing and office projects. They are highly committed to providing the best service, thus meeting the expectations of all their clients. Its strength is the development of real estate projects based on principles of high social responsibility, quality and efficiency with the support of a great team of multidisciplinary professionals, focusing all their efforts on the satisfaction of their clients and building a better country.**ARCHITECT: KOBI KARP**

Miami-based architect Kobi Karp has crafted a diverse portfolio encompassing opulent hotels, exclusive celebrity residences, and inclusive public housing endeavors. Central to his ethos is the seamless integration of structures with their natural surroundings, fostering an intimate connection. Renowned projects such as the Palazzo Del Sol luxury apartments on Fisher Island, boasting the nation's highest per capita income, and the restoration of The Surf Club exemplify his approach. Notably, Karp's latest achievement, the Four Seasons Fort Lauderdale, harmonizes with the urban fabric, featuring verdant parks that offer a communal sanctuary, epitomizing a tropical urban oasis.

![](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/image15.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)

![](https://edgehouse.miami/assets/images/image04.jpg?v=ed7f87c7)

## Investing in Miami?

Investing in Miami offers a multitude of advantages. The city's dynamic real estate market is supported by a diverse and growing economy, with strong demand for both residential and commercial properties. Miami's strategic location as a gateway to Latin America boosts its global business appeal. The city is known for its lively cultural scene, pleasant climate, and excellent lifestyle amenities, attracting both residents and tourists. This results in strong rental yields and property value appreciation. Furthermore, Florida's absence of state income tax and Miami's extensive transportation infrastructure, including a major international airport and seaport, enhance its attractiveness. These factors collectively ensure significant returns and long-term growth for investors.
